title: HaloCheck v2 Corpus Schema
description: Master schema for all note records in the HaloCheck v2 corpus. Every pipeline layer reads from and writes to this schema.

source.description: Origin dataset of the source note.

source_text.description: Raw source clinical note text. Ground truth for hallucination detection.

clean_summary.description: Faithful LLM-generated summary of source_text. No injections.

test_summary.description: Summary evaluated by the pipeline. Equals clean_summary for non-injected notes; contains exactly one injected error for injected notes.

is_injected.description: True if test_summary contains at least one controlled hallucination injection.

is_pure_ood.description: True if this note is in the pure OOD evaluation pool. These notes have exactly one injection of type dosage_unit_swap and NO co-injected in-distribution errors. OOD F1 is computed on these notes only.

injections.description: Ground truth injection records. Empty array for non-injected notes.

entity_id.description: Stable entity identifier used for TP matching in evaluate.py. Derived from injected_value for additive types (diagnosis_fabrication), from original_value for all others. Must use format {note_id}_{normalized_entity_text}.

original_text.description: Exact text changed FROM. For additive injections (diagnosis_fabrication) this is the inserted phrase. '[removed]' for critical_omission.

injected_text.description: Exact text changed TO. '[removed]' for critical_omission.

detections.description: Pipeline detection output. Populated by layer4_severity.py after deduplication.

entity_id.description: Must use format {note_id}_{normalized_entity_text} — same format as injection entity_id to enable cross-layer deduplication and TP matching.

detected_by.description: List of layers that flagged this entity. Multi-element after deduplication.

flagged_text.description: The exact text span flagged. For Layer 1 this is the entity string; for Layer 2 this is the full flagged sentence.

confidence.description: Detection confidence. For multi-layer detections, this is the noisy-OR fused score.

matched_source.description: Layer 2 only: the source sentence that contradicted the flagged summary sentence.

hhem_score.description: facebook/bart-large-mnli factuality score. 1.0 = fully consistent, 0.0 = hallucinated. Score < 0.5 = baseline flags as hallucination. Null until hhem_baseline.py runs.

split.description: Dataset split assignment. stress = PubMed + StatPearls notes (domain-shift evaluation).

pmc_id.description: PubMed Central article ID (pubmed source notes only).
